summary: Completed comprehensive testing of School Renewal Workflow. All backend API tests pass (10/10). Frontend UI verified with Lost Reason Modal, Renewal Meeting Modal, Renewal Convert Modal, and all status stages working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Renewal workflow fully implemented and tested. STATUS_SECTIONS includes renewal_meeting (teal) and renewed (emerald). Active Schools show 'Renewal Meeting' button instead of 'Renewed'. Lost Reason Modal has dropdown with predefined reasons and custom option. Renewal Meeting Modal has date picker, time slots, meeting type (online/offline), and corresponding link/address input. Renewal Convert Modal pre-fills with existing onboarding_data. init-onboarding endpoint accepts is_renewal flag.

lost_reason_modal.details: Modal shows dropdown with 8 options: Select a reason, Budget constraints, Chose competitor, Program not suitable, Decision postponed, No response, Management change, Other (specify). Custom textarea appears when 'Other' is selected.

active_schools_buttons.details: Active Schools section shows 'Renewal Meeting' button (teal) instead of 'Renewed' button. Also shows Edit, Lost, Assign, Note buttons.

renewal_meeting_stage.details: New 'renewal_meeting' stage visible in STATUS_SECTIONS with teal color. Shows Renewed, Follow-up, Lost, Assign, Note buttons.

patch_renewal_fields.details: PATCH /api/schools/inquiry/{id} accepts lost_reason, renewal_meeting_date, renewal_meeting_time, renewal_meeting_type, renewal_meeting_link, renewal_meeting_address fields.

renewal_meeting_modal.details: Modal shows Meeting Type (In-Person/Online), Calendar for date selection, 7 time slots (10:00-17:00), Meeting Link input for online, Meeting Address input for offline, Notes field, Schedule Meeting button.

renewal_convert_modal.details: Modal shows Renewal Amount input, Model dropdown, Kit Type dropdown, Book Type dropdown, Training Type dropdown, Contract Start/End date pickers, Total Students input, MOU Document upload, Complete Renewal button.

init_onboarding_renewal.details: POST /api/schools/{id}/init-onboarding accepts is_renewal flag and generates tracking token (oll-xxxx format). Timeline shows 'Renewal Started' for renewals.

renewed_stage.details: Renewed stage shows schools with emerald color. Shows Edit, Lost, Assign, Note buttons. Displays conversion amount.

test_execution_details.test_type: Backend API Testing + Frontend UI Testing

notes.email_templates: Welcome and renewal emails are code-complete but require Resend domain verification to work in production (MOCKED - emails won't actually send without domain verification)
notes.test_school: Test School Two (c98520ba-646d-4103-838a-54417676750f) was moved to renewal_meeting status with meeting date 2026-02-10 at 14:00 as mentioned in agent context
